1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN, KERRY AS TO DEFENDANT YORK CLAIMS SERVICE INC DOES 1 THRUGH 100,INCLUSIVE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT YORK CLAIMS SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE TO PLACER COUNTY. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT IS A FOREIGN CORPORATION THAT HAS NOT DESIGNATED A PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS WITHIN CALIFORNIA IN ITS STATEMENT OF INFORMATION. VENUE IS PROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO. INSUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES AND ENDS OF JUSTICE WOULD BE PROMOTED BY THE CHANGE. REQUESTS FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES ARE DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: TAMRA KEEN, CSR #5404

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Form Interrogatories - Employment Law To Deft York Claims Service, Inc. And Request For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Kerry Green's Motion to compel further responses to plaintiff Kerry Green's first set of form interrogatories-employment law-to defendant York Claims Service, Inc., and request for attorney's fees:
a. Motion to compel further responses to plaintiff Kerry Green's first set of form interrogatories-employment law-granted as to Form Interrogatory Nos. 204.7; and 207.1;
b. Defendant shall serve a verified supplemental response to the specified interrogatories within ten days of notice of entry of this order;
c. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Form Interrogatories - Employment Law To Deft York Claims Service, Inc. And Request For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Continued To Oct-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, Plaintiff Kerry Green's motion to compel further responses to first set of form interrogatories - Employment Law-to defendant York Claim Service, Inc., and request for attorney's fees, is continued to October 1, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. per stipulation and order of 9/15/09. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-25-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-08-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 220

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT YORK CLAIMS SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE TO PLACER COUNTY.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion for Change of Venue is denied. Defendant is a foreign corporation that has not designated a principal place of business withIN California in its Statement of Information. Venue is proper in San Francisco. Insufficient showing that the convenience of witnesses and ends of justice would be promoted by the change. Requests for attorney's fees are denied. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW/xCH) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: TAMRA KEEN, CSR #5404
